items.content_html: This repository hosts my personalized Neovim configuration, optimized for an efficient development workflow. It includes custom key mappings, a curated selection of plugins, and tailored settings to enhance coding productivity. Designed for developers looking to streamline their Neovim experience, this setup focuses on usability and performance.
items.title: StuCodeGreen/nvim-setup: This repository hosts my personalized Neovim configuration, optimized for an efficient development workflow. It includes custom key mappings, a curated selection of plugins, and tailored settings to enhance coding productivity. Designed for developers looking to streamline their Neovim experience, this setup focuses on usability and performance.
